# StrapiShift

> Automated Strapi v3 to v5 migration platform

StrapiShift is an open-source tool that analyzes Strapi v3 content-type schemas and produces detailed migration reports for upgrading to Strapi v5. It detects breaking changes, estimates effort, and generates actionable checklists.

## What it does

- Analyzes Strapi v3 schemas against 14 rules across 7 categories (database, API, media, relations, auth, plugins, GraphQL)
- Detects breaking changes including Base64 images in rich text, API response envelope changes, relation syntax changes, and plugin compatibility
- Generates migration reports in JSON, HTML, Markdown, and CSV formats
- Produces standalone checklists for contract developer handoff
- Verifies parity between v3 source and v5 target schemas field-by-field
- Fetches schemas directly from running Strapi instances

## Key pages

- / — Landing page with technical overview
- /analyze — Schema analysis tool (paste JSON or fetch from instance)
- /report — Migration report with findings and export options
- /verify — Parity verification comparing v3 and v5 schemas
- /about — Project information

## Technical details

- Built with Nuxt 4, TypeScript, and Nuxt UI
- Analysis runs entirely client-side (no data sent to servers)
- 14 rules detect: field renames, MongoDB nested docs, ObjectId refs, API response envelope, filter/sort/pagination syntax, populate behavior, Base64 in richtext, media reference format, relation cardinality, polymorphic relations, circular references, auth model changes, plugin compatibility, GraphQL schema changes
- 62 tests across core engine and CLI

## Links

- Website: https://strapishift.icjia.app
- Source: https://github.com/ICJIA/strapishift
- License: MIT
- Author: Illinois Criminal Justice Information Authority (ICJIA)
